title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 06 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 07/09/2022
Image reference: 2022-09-07_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-september-06-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have softened
Handy BC Malto Hope (28,200 DWT, Jul 2013, I-S) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 13.60 mil, VV Value USD 16.47 mil - BWTS Fitted. Tankers: Tanker values have firmed
VLCC DHT Edelweiss (301,000 DWT, Jan 2008, Daewoo) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 37.00 mil, VV Value USD 40.93 mil - SS Due. LR2 Lila Fujairah (113,800 DWT, Oct 2007, Daewoo) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 27.80 mil, VV Value USD 27.96 mil - SS Due.
